expectations.text: Recommends <dialog> element OR role='dialog' with aria-modal='true'
expectations.evidence: Explicitly recommends native <dialog> element with .showModal() and explains why it's preferred over <div role='dialog'>

expectations.text: Mentions aria-labelledby pointing to the dialog title
expectations.evidence: Uses aria-labelledby='trade-dialog-title' pointing at the <h2> and explains why aria-labelledby is preferred over aria-label

expectations.text: Covers focus trap — focus cycles within the modal
expectations.evidence: Notes that showModal() handles focus trapping automatically; explains not to add manual trap on top

expectations.text: Mentions moving focus INTO the dialog on open
expectations.evidence: Uses autoFocus on Send Offer button; explains the rationale and alternate approach of focusing the dialog element itself

expectations.text: Mentions returning focus to trigger element on close
expectations.evidence: Passes triggerRef and calls triggerRef.current?.focus() in useEffect watching isOpen

expectations.text: Covers Escape key closing the dialog
expectations.evidence: Intercepts the native 'cancel' event with preventDefault and calls onCancel(); explains why preventDefault is needed
Full TypeScript React component with props interface, useEffect hooks, and usage example
